productSummary: Healthcare communication and coordination platform for clinics, hospitals, and specialty care teams. Supports secure collaboration, patient communication, and operational coordination across care settings.

knownTeams.name: Patient Support
knownTeams.description: Handles patient inquiries, access issues, and communication-related questions

knownTeams.name: Sales
knownTeams.description: Inbound demo requests and outbound outreach to clinics and care networks

knownTeams.name: Implementation
knownTeams.description: Guides new healthcare organizations through setup, rollout, and training

knownTeams.name: Enterprise CS
knownTeams.description: Dedicated support for larger care groups and multi-site accounts

topPainPoints: Long first-response times during peak demand
Difficulty tracking escalated coordination issues across teams

suggestedPreviewContext: Focus on coordination responsiveness, cross-team escalation tracking, and communication reliability across care teams.
